description: baseline: 1205-line architecture, comprehensive but verbose, lacks terminal-native UX design
added terminal-native Human-Agent Interaction Protocol (§15): commands, response format, approval flow, live updates, terminal-aware rendering
added session persistence & recovery (§16): multi-level persistence, auto-save triggers, 4 recovery scenarios, session lifecycle commands, snapshot type
added error recovery & self-healing (§17): failure matrix, 3 protocols, healing workflow, 4-level escalation, diagnostics, commands
multi-agent handoff section not fully added but content captured in §18 point 15
added plugin & extension system (§19): 8 plugin types, manifest format, lifecycle, commands, security model, discovery flow
added performance & metrics (§18) and security & audit trail (§19): bottleneck detection, cost tracking, threat model, audit trail, guardrails schema; expanded §21 gives us to 22 points
added testing & validation strategy (§20): pyramid, unit/integration/system tests, quality gates, test commands
added configuration system (§21): 5-level hierarchy, YAML config, profiles, secrets, validation
deepened §4 Worker Agent Definitions: role specifications, lifecycle, decisions, quality criteria for all 7 roles
deepened §12 Observability: dashboard, event schema, metrics pipeline, alert rules, commands
deepened §8 Data Flow: lifecycle stages, state machine, detailed data flow (input→planning, research→implementation, implementation→review, review→validation)
deepened §5 MCP Integration: security/sandbox, auto-discovery, lifecycle management, rate limiting
added §25 Deployment & Operations: 3 deployment modes, local/Docker guides, production checklist, ops, scaling, maintenance
